# (regenerated on every `cargo test` by zenutils-apidoc; ZEN_API_DOC=check verifies, =off skips).

# count + exceptions; trait impls collapse to one roster line per

# impls omitted; re-export duplicates annotated `[also: path]`.

#[non_exhaustive] pub enum ButteraugliError
pub ButteraugliError::Cancelled(enough::reason::StopReason)
#[non_exhaustive] pub ButteraugliError::DimensionMismatch
pub ButteraugliError::DimensionMismatch::h1: usize
pub ButteraugliError::DimensionMismatch::h2: usize
pub ButteraugliError::DimensionMismatch::w1: usize
pub ButteraugliError::DimensionMismatch::w2: usize
#[non_exhaustive] pub ButteraugliError::DimensionOverflow
pub ButteraugliError::DimensionOverflow::height: usize
pub ButteraugliError::DimensionOverflow::width: usize

pub ButteraugliError::ImageTooSmall::height: usize
pub ButteraugliError::ImageTooSmall::width: usize

pub ButteraugliError::InvalidParameter::reason: &'static str
pub ButteraugliError::InvalidParameter::value: f64
pub ButteraugliError::NonFiniteResult

pub fn ButteraugliParams::hf_asymmetry(&self) -> f32

#[non_exhaustive] pub struct ButteraugliResult
pub ButteraugliResult::diffmap: core::option::Option<imgref::ImgVec<f32>>
pub ButteraugliResult::pnorm_3: f64
pub ButteraugliResult::score: f64
pub fn ButteraugliResult::max_norm(&self) -> f64
pub fn ButteraugliResult::pnorm(&self, f64) -> core::option::Option<f64>

pub fn ButteraugliStripConfig::with_halo_rows(usize) -> Self

pub const BUTTERAUGLI_GOOD: f64
pub const HALO_ROWS_DEFAULT: usize

pub fn butteraugli(imgref::ImgRef<'_, rgb::RGB8>, imgref::ImgRef<'_, rgb::RGB8>, &ButteraugliParams) -> core::result::Result<ButteraugliResult, ButteraugliError>

pub fn butteraugli_strip(imgref::ImgRef<'_, rgb::RGB8>, imgref::ImgRef<'_, rgb::RGB8>, &ButteraugliParams, u32) -> core::result::Result<ButteraugliResult, ButteraugliError>

pub fn butteraugli_strip_with_stop(imgref::ImgRef<'_, rgb::RGB8>, imgref::ImgRef<'_, rgb::RGB8>, &ButteraugliParams, u32, &dyn enough::Stop) -> core::result::Result<ButteraugliResult, ButteraugliError>

4 types implement all of: Freeze, RefUnwindSafe, Send, Sync, Unpin, UnwindSafe
